## ⚠️  CHANGE CONTROL REQUIRED

This specification is locked and serves as the immutable baseline for this project.

**Any modifications to this locked specification require**:
1. Submit formal change request: `docs/artifacts/cross-cutting/change-requests.md`
2. Conduct impact analysis (architecture, implementation, timeline, cost)
3. Obtain stakeholder approval
4. Create new version (v1.1 for minor changes, v2.0 for major changes)

**The original locked specification (this file) never changes.**
